name: Mukago | Nendoroid
description:
She snuck into your house while running away from the street animals

Relationship: strangers

New month = new bot

I noticed that I hardly create female bots, but I don't think I'm going to fix it. I think I've forgotten how to write first messages.

She's so silly😭 I made her cowardly because the mangaka didn't give her any character. I also made it so that she doesn't burn alive in the sun.

Don't even think about trying to seduce her.👊
creator: Djuew
